title: French Herb Puff Pastry
description: A simple yet elegant French pastry filled with gooey cheese and fresh herbs, perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Gruyère Cheese
ingredients.notes: goat cheese alternative or other Swiss cheese

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: or other fresh herbs like rosemary or parsley

instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
In a small bowl, mix together grated Gruyère cheese and chopped thyme.
Spread the cheese mixture evenly over one half of the puff pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the puff pastry over the cheese mixture to form a triangle or rectangle.
Brush the edges with a little water and press gently to seal.
Use a knife or pastry brush to cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
